note: Real-world professional requests the library measures itself against. The grow workflow appends items harvested from GitHub issues labelled 'skill-request'; you can also add rows by hand. Fields: topic (short name), ask (the request in the user's words), demand (rough weight, ≥1), optional slug (kebab-case skill name) and description (a starter SKILL.md description). scripts/mine-gaps.mjs scores each against the catalog and drafts the biggest uncovered one.

requests.ask: Help me write a product requirements document for a new feature
Write a cold sales email that gets a reply
Run a blameless postmortem after an outage
Prepare the narrative for a board deck
Give me structured questions and a rubric to run a candidate reference check by phone
requests.description: Run a rigorous candidate reference check. Use when asked to prepare or conduct reference calls for a job candidate. Produces a structured question set, probing follow-ups, and a scoring rubric that surfaces real signal without leading the referee.

requests.ask: We're sunsetting an API — help me plan the customer communications and migration timeline
requests.description: Plan the communications for deprecating a product, API, or feature. Use when winding down something customers depend on. Produces a staged timeline, tiered customer messaging, a migration guide outline, and an internal escalation plan.

requests.ask: Help me respond to a procurement RFP and score our fit before we commit
requests.description: Draft a competitive response to a request-for-proposal and qualify the opportunity first. Use when responding to an RFP/RFI. Produces a bid/no-bid assessment, a compliance matrix, win-theme messaging, and a structured response outline.

requests.ask: Write a clean end-of-shift on-call handoff so nothing gets dropped
requests.description: Produce a rigorous on-call / shift handoff. Use at the end of an on-call rotation or support shift. Produces a prioritised list of open incidents, watch items, recent changes, and explicit owner/next-step for each so nothing is dropped.

requests.ask: Model a usage-based pricing scheme with tiers and guardrails against bill shock
Draft a moderation policy and escalation ladder for our user community
requests.description: Write a fair, enforceable community moderation policy. Use when standing up or overhauling moderation for a forum, Discord, or user community. Produces conduct rules, a graduated enforcement ladder, appeals process, and moderator guidelines.
